GMHUB.Settings.BaseUrl.Name: DMhub Base URL
GMHUB.Settings.BaseUrl.Hint: Root URL of your DMhub web app, e.g. https://gmhub.app
GMHUB.Settings.ApiKey.Name: DMhub Personal Access Token
GMHUB.Settings.ApiKey.Hint: Bearer token from /account/api-tokens. Plaintext starts with dmhub_pat_ and is shown exactly once at issuance.
GMHUB.Settings.CampaignId.Name: DMhub Campaign ID
GMHUB.Settings.CampaignId.Hint: UUID of the DMhub campaign this Foundry world is bound to. Find it in the URL bar on /campaigns/[id].
GMHUB.Settings.AutoPush.Name: Auto-push journal updates
GMHUB.Settings.AutoPush.Hint: When enabled, any journal edited in Foundry is pushed to DMhub immediately.
GMHUB.Dialog.NoCampaignBody: Set a Campaign ID in Module Settings to bind this world to a DMhub campaign.
GMHUB.Dialog.NoSessionBody: Pick a prepped session from DMhub to start syncing. The chosen session is the world's active session until you pick another.
GMHUB.PickSession.Body: Sessions in this campaign that have a session plan.
GMHUB.PickSession.Empty: No sessions found. Create one in DMhub first.
GMHUB.PickSession.NoCampaign: No campaign bound. Set a Campaign ID in Module Settings first.
GMHUB.ConfirmOverwrite.Body: Pulling will overwrite any unpushed local edits in the listed journals. This is the conflict policy: direction wins (Pull overwrites Foundry).
GMHUB.Notify.NotImplemented: Not yet implemented — wires up in a follow-up commit.
GMHUB.Warn.NoSessionsSecrets: Token is missing the sessions:secrets scope — GM Secrets won't sync.
GMHUB.Scope.entities:read: Read NPCs, locations, factions, items, quests, lore.
GMHUB.Scope.sessions:read: Read sessions and plans (without GM secrets).
GMHUB.Scope.sessions:secrets: Read AND write the GM Secrets page on a session plan. GM-only forever.
GMHUB.Error.401: DMhub rejected the token. Mint a new one at /account/api-tokens and paste it into Module Settings.
GMHUB.Error.401.MissingCredentials: Set your DMhub API key in Module Settings.
GMHUB.Error.403: Your DMhub token is missing the '{scope}' permission. Reissue with that scope checked.
GMHUB.Error.403.Generic: DMhub refused the request. Check that the token has the right scopes.
GMHUB.Error.409.single_active_session: Another session is already running in this campaign. End it before starting a new one.
GMHUB.Error.409.session_ended: That session has ended. Pick a different session.
GMHUB.Error.409.Generic: DMhub flagged a conflict on that operation.
GMHUB.Error.429: DMhub rate limit hit. Try again in {seconds}s.
GMHUB.Error.5xx: DMhub server is having trouble. Try again in a minute.
